title: trema rufescens
intro: Trema rufescens, also known as the Red Trema or Jungle Jujube, is a small tree or shrub that belongs to the family Cannabaceae. It is traditionally used in folk medicine for its various medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Trema rufescens include the treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory infections, as well as its use as a wound healing agent due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. Trema rufescens can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and benefits.
